name: VibroSense Broadband RMS + Crest Factor
description: Broadband RMS via precision rectifier on PGA output. Crest factor = peak/RMS using OTA peak detector + hold cap. Kurtosis computed digitally by host MCU from 8-bit ADC samples.
margin_rule: RMS and peak detectors must pass independently before integration.

crest_factor_accuracy_pct.description: Crest factor accuracy vs digital golden reference

power_uw.description: Total power for RMS + peak + crest blocks
